title_en: The Secret Additive in Your Pork!
title_es: ¡El Aditivo Secreto en Tu Carne de Cerdo!
hook_en: Did you know? Your pork might contain a banned additive!
hook_es: ¿Sabías que? ¡Tu cerdo podría contener un aditivo prohibido!
key_message: Ractopamine is used in US livestock but banned in 160+ countries due to health risks.
visual_elements: Close-up of raw pork with a question mark overlay
Map highlighting countries where ractopamine is banned
Clip of heart monitor beeping with text on cardiovascular risks
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • Ractopamine: Pork, beef, turkey (growth promoter in livestock) — Banned in: EU, China, Russia, 160+ countries — Health concern: Cardiovascular effects; residues in meat may affect heart rate

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_es: ¡Por Qué Siguen Aumentando las Tasas de Obesidad!
hook_en: Spot the trend with me—obesity rates are skyrocketing!
hook_es: Observa la tendencia conmigo—¡las tasas de obesidad se disparan!
key_message: US deregulation over the years has contributed significantly to the obesity epidemic.
visual_elements: Graph animation showing rising obesity rates
Comparison of food labels over the decades
Overlay of fast-food imagery with text on deregulation
